title: DENTAL CARE SERVICES - 211info
text: GRAND RONDE HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER DENTAL CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers general dental care including dental restorations. 9615 Grand Ronde Road Grand Ronde, OR 97347 Eligibility: Members of any federally recognized tribe or spouse of Grand Ronde Tribal member. Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm, Thursday 9:30am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm Email (503) 879-2020 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 879-2020 Dental Care Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Schedules four weeks out. Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurance DOCUMENTS: Insurance information if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Polk and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-5pm, Thursday 9:30am-5pm Services: Dental Prosthodontics * Native American Community Dental Restoration * Native American Community General Dentistry * Native American Community Orthodontics * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - PRIMARY CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
